Description: Verify insurance plans can be added to an in-progress invoice
Pre-conditions: Invoice exists in 'In Progress' status; Patient has insurance plans assigned
Test Steps: 1. Open invoice for patient with insurance plans|2. Click 'Insurance' button|3. Select one or more insurance plans|4. Save changes
Expected Result: Insurance plans are linked to invoice; Coverage calculations appear in summary

Description: Verify insurance plans can be removed from an in-progress invoice
Pre-conditions: Invoice with insurance plans attached; Invoice in 'In Progress' status
Test Steps: 1. Open invoice with insurance plans|2. Click 'Insurance' button|3. Deselect insurance plan|4. Save changes
Expected Result: Insurance plan removed; Coverage recalculated

Description: Verify coverage is calculated correctly per invoice item
Pre-conditions: Invoice with insurance plans; Items with 'insurable' flag set
Test Steps: 1. Add insurable items to invoice|2. Add insurance plan with specific coverage percentage|3. Review coverage amounts in PriceCell
Expected Result: Coverage amount equals item discounted price * coverage percentage

Description: Verify non-insurable products do not get insurance coverage
Pre-conditions: Invoice with mixed insurable and non-insurable items
Test Steps: 1. Add insurable item|2. Add non-insurable item|3. Add insurance plan|4. Review coverage
Expected Result: Only insurable items show coverage; Non-insurable items show zero coverage

Description: Verify insurance coverage is snapshotted when invoice is finalised
Pre-conditions: Invoice with insurance plans and coverage
Test Steps: 1. Create invoice with insurance|2. Note coverage amounts|3. Finalise invoice|4. Check InvoiceItemFinalisedInsurance records
Expected Result: Finalised insurance coverage stored in InvoiceItemFinalisedInsurance table

Description: Verify patient payments can be refunded
Pre-conditions: Finalised invoice with patient payment recorded
Test Steps: 1. Open invoice with patient payment|2. Click refund action on payment|3. Enter refund details (method and amount)|4. Confirm refund
Expected Result: Refund payment created with originalPaymentId linking to original; Original payment shows 'Refunded' status

Description: Verify refunded amounts are excluded from invoice totals
Pre-conditions: Invoice with payment and refund recorded
Test Steps: 1. Create payment|2. Refund payment|3. Review invoice summary
Expected Result: Refund amount not counted in total payments; Balance recalculated correctly

Description: Verify refund payments cannot be refunded again
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to refund a payment that is itself a refund
Expected Result: Refund action disabled or error displayed; Operation prevented

Description: Verify original payment cannot be refunded twice
Pre-conditions: Payment that has already been refunded
Test Steps: 1. Attempt to refund a payment that already has a refund
Expected Result: Refund action disabled or error displayed; Operation prevented

Description: Verify patient payment status updates correctly
Test Steps: 1. Record partial payment|2. Check status shows 'Partial'|3. Record remaining amount|4. Check status shows 'Paid'
Expected Result: Payment status changes: Unpaid -> Partial -> Paid

Description: Verify coverage from multiple insurance plans stacks correctly
Test Steps: 1. Add invoice with items|2. Add two insurance plans with different coverage|3. Review total coverage
Expected Result: Total coverage is sum of individual plan coverages; Display shows per-plan breakdown

Description: Verify coverage does not exceed item price
Pre-conditions: Item with multiple high-coverage insurance plans
Test Steps: 1. Add item with price $100|2. Add plans totaling >100% coverage|3. Check coverage amounts
Expected Result: Total coverage capped appropriately; No negative balance

Description: Verify MAR grid displays correctly for an encounter date
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to encounter|2. Open MAR tab|3. Select date with scheduled doses
Expected Result: MAR grid shows prescriptions as rows; Time slots as columns; Status indicators displayed

Description: Verify dose can be recorded as given
Test Steps: 1. Open MAR view|2. Click on pending dose cell|3. Select 'Given'|4. Enter dose details|5. Save
Expected Result: MAR status updated to 'Given'; Dose record created with time and user

Description: Verify dose can be recorded as not given with reason
Pre-conditions: Active prescription with pending MAR; Reasons for not given configured
Test Steps: 1. Open MAR view|2. Click on pending dose cell|3. Select 'Not Given'|4. Select reason|5. Save
Expected Result: MAR status updated to 'Not Given'; Reason recorded

Description: Verify recorded dose can be edited
Test Steps: 1. Open MAR view|2. Click on recorded dose|3. Modify dose amount or time|4. Provide change reason|5. Save
Expected Result: Dose updated; Change reason stored; isEdited flag set

Description: Verify multiple doses can be recorded for split dosing
Pre-conditions: Prescription with frequency allowing multiple doses
Test Steps: 1. Record first dose|2. Add additional dose to same MAR|3. Review MAR details
Expected Result: Multiple doses displayed; Individual dose times shown

Description: Verify additional doses can be removed
Test Steps: 1. Open MAR with multiple doses|2. Remove additional dose|3. Provide removal reason
Expected Result: Dose marked as removed; Reason stored; Main dose remains

Description: Verify MARs are generated based on prescription frequency
Pre-conditions: New prescription with frequency and ideal times
Test Steps: 1. Create prescription with daily frequency|2. Set ideal administration time|3. Check generated MARs
Expected Result: MARs created for each scheduled dose; dueAt times match frequency pattern

Description: Verify MARs regenerate when prescription is modified
Test Steps: 1. Modify prescription frequency or times|2. Check MAR regeneration
Expected Result: New MARs generated for updated schedule; Old pending MARs handled appropriately

Description: Verify changelog tracks all MAR modifications
Test Steps: 1. Record dose|2. Edit dose|3. View changelog
Expected Result: Changelog shows creation and edit events with timestamps and users

Description: Verify status icons show correct states
Test Steps: 1. View MAR with given/not given/paused/discontinued entries
Expected Result: Correct icons displayed for each status; Tooltips show details

Description: Verify prescriptions can be sent to pharmacy
Test Steps: 1. Select prescriptions|2. Click 'Send to pharmacy'|3. Review order|4. Confirm
Expected Result: Pharmacy order created; Prescriptions linked to order

Description: Verify medication due tasks exclude completed MARs
Test Steps: 1. View user tasks|2. Check medication due tasks
Expected Result: Tasks only show for MARs not yet recorded; Completed/paused excluded

Description: Verify dispense modal opens for medication request
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to medication requests|2. Click on request row|3. Modal opens
Expected Result: DispenseMedicationWorkflowModal displays with medication details

Description: Verify multiple medications can be selected for dispensing
Test Steps: 1. Open dispense modal|2. Select/deselect medications|3. Review selection
Expected Result: Selected medications shown; Quantities editable

Description: Verify full dispense workflow completes successfully
Test Steps: 1. Open dispense modal|2. Set quantities|3. Add instructions|4. Select dispensed by user|5. Click Review|6. Click Dispense & Print
Expected Result: Dispense records created; Prescription marked completed; Print triggered

Description: Verify label preview displays in review step
Test Steps: 1. Complete dispense step|2. View review step
Expected Result: Label preview shows medication name/instructions/patient/quantity/prescriber/date

Description: Verify labels print correctly on dispense
Test Steps: 1. Complete dispense and print|2. Check print output
Expected Result: Labels formatted to configured size (default 80x40mm); All required fields present

Description: Verify labels can be reprinted for dispensed medications
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to dispensed medication|2. Open print label modal|3. Print
Expected Result: Labels regenerated and printed for existing dispense record

Description: Verify dispensed medication details can be edited
Test Steps: 1. Open dispensed medication details|2. Click edit|3. Modify quantity/instructions|4. Save
Expected Result: Dispense record updated; Changes reflected in details view

Description: Verify dispensed medication can be cancelled
Test Steps: 1. Open dispensed medication|2. Click cancel|3. Confirm cancellation
Expected Result: Dispense record deleted; Prescription returned to active status

Description: Verify medications with unavailable stock cannot be dispensed
Test Steps: 1. View medication requests|2. Check unavailable medication
Expected Result: Dispensing blocked for unavailable stock; Clear indication shown

Description: Verify 'Dispensed by' user can be selected
Test Steps: 1. Open dispense modal|2. Select dispensed by user
Expected Result: User selection works; Selected user recorded on dispense

Description: Verify global dispensed medications list works
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to /medication/dispensed|2. Apply filters|3. Review list
Expected Result: List shows all dispensed medications; Filters work correctly

Description: Verify label size respects configuration
Test Steps: 1. Configure custom label size in settings|2. Print medication label
Expected Result: Label renders at configured dimensions

Description: Verify appointments filtered correctly for facility timezone
Pre-conditions: Facility timezone different from primary timezone
Test Steps: 1. Create appointment near midnight|2. View today's appointments
Expected Result: Appointments appear on correct date based on facility timezone

Description: Verify lab requests filtered correctly across timezones
Pre-conditions: Lab requests with dates near timezone boundary
Test Steps: 1. Create lab request near midnight|2. Filter by date
Expected Result: Lab requests appear on correct date per facility timezone

Description: Verify MAR view shows correct MARs for selected date
Pre-conditions: MARs scheduled near midnight in different timezone
Test Steps: 1. Select MAR date|2. Verify MARs shown
Expected Result: MARs for selected date displayed correctly per facility timezone

Description: Verify datetimes stored in primary timezone format
Test Steps: 1. Create record with datetime|2. Check database value
Expected Result: Datetime stored as ISO 9075 in primary timezone

Description: Verify datetimes displayed in facility timezone
Test Steps: 1. Create record|2. View record in UI
Expected Result: Datetime displayed converted to facility timezone

Test Case Name: Datetime input converts to primary timezone
Description: Verify datetime inputs converted correctly for storage
Test Steps: 1. Enter datetime in form|2. Submit|3. Check stored value
Expected Result: Input converted from facility to primary timezone before storage

Description: Verify timezone mismatches detected on startup
Test Steps: 1. Configure mismatched timezone|2. Start server
Expected Result: Warning logged about timezone mismatch; Server behavior depends on allowMismatchedTimeZones

Description: Verify date-only fields stored without timezone conversion
Test Steps: 1. Enter date|2. Save|3. Check stored value
Expected Result: Date stored as-is without timezone conversion

Description: Verify current date/time functions use correct timezone
Test Steps: 1. Call getCurrentDate functions|2. Compare to expected timezone
Expected Result: Date/time returned in primary timezone

Description: Verify display formatters apply facility timezone
Test Steps: 1. Format stored datetime for display|2. Check output
Expected Result: Formatted string shows facility timezone time

Description: Verify MAR due times calculated correctly for timezone
Test Steps: 1. Create prescription with ideal time|2. Check generated MAR due times
Expected Result: Due times correctly reflect timezone for scheduling

Description: Verify report date ranges respect facility timezone
Test Steps: 1. Generate report for date range|2. Check included records
Expected Result: Records included based on facility timezone date boundaries

Description: Verify sync succeeds when child records arrive before parent
Test Steps: 1. Push child record before parent|2. Complete sync
Expected Result: Sync succeeds; Both records persisted; FK constraint satisfied at commit

Description: Verify invoice payments with refunds sync correctly
Test Steps: 1. Create payment|2. Create refund referencing original|3. Sync in child-first order
Expected Result: Both payments synced correctly despite ordering

Description: Verify tasks with parent references sync correctly
Test Steps: 1. Create parent task|2. Create child task|3. Sync child before parent
Expected Result: Both tasks synced; Parent-child relationship preserved

Description: Verify full central sync cycle completes
Test Steps: 1. Make changes at facility|2. Run sync|3. Verify changes at central
Expected Result: Changes pushed to central; Pull returns updates

Description: Verify facility receives and persists synced changes
Test Steps: 1. Make changes at central|2. Run facility sync|3. Verify changes at facility
Expected Result: Changes pulled and persisted at facility

Description: Verify original FK violation errors are preserved
Test Steps: 1. Attempt sync with invalid FK|2. Check error message
Expected Result: Clear FK violation error returned; Not masked by deferral logic

Description: Verify changelog triggers work with deferred constraints
Test Steps: 1. Sync records with changelog tracking|2. Check changelog entries
Expected Result: Changelog entries created; Triggers execute at commit

Description: Verify mobile sync handles FK deferral correctly
Test Steps: 1. Sync child records before parents to mobile|2. Verify data integrity
Expected Result: Records synced successfully; SQLite defer_foreign_keys works

Description: Verify sync sessions are properly managed
Test Steps: 1. Start sync session|2. Complete operations|3. End session
Expected Result: Session created with ID; Properly cleaned up on completion

Test Case Name: Large batch sync with deferred FK
Description: Verify large batches sync with deferred constraints
Test Steps: 1. Sync large batch with mixed ordering|2. Monitor progress|3. Verify completion
Expected Result: All records persisted; Constraints satisfied at commit

Description: Verify sync respects model dependency order
Test Steps: 1. Sync records spanning multiple models|2. Check insert order
Expected Result: Parent models inserted before dependent children

Description: Verify streaming pull endpoint works correctly
Test Steps: 1. Initiate streaming pull|2. Receive all chunks|3. Verify completeness
Expected Result: All records received via stream; No data loss
